calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Mar-24-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER DENNIS CARLIN's Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus.

No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Off calendar. Petitioner has not filed proof of service of summons of the petition for writ of mandate on respondent or lodged the administrative record at least five days before the hearing, as required. (Cal. R. Ct. 3.1140.).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
